codeReview.summary: ReviewPanel now surfaces the requested workbench context header using the existing currentTask data model, with title, model, requester, reviewer/approver chips, component count, and current workflow node displayed ahead of the existing workflow actions. I did not find blocking or non-blocking code defects within this feature scope.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-worker skill still frames manual browser verification as a default step, but this worker skipped it for a UI-only feature and relied on later user-testing validation. The procedure could better distinguish when milestone-level user-testing is expected to cover visual checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript/handoff for session adb37d2f-0710-4e06-8d4a-a4fb4cde01e4 marks skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false because step 5 manual verification was skipped, while `.factory/skills/ui-worker/SKILL.md` still prescribes browser validation for UI features.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit d2dd212102977682543a9d8f6170d8eba1193acb for m4-workbench-task-context.
